title: BDO Greece
description: ***.gr zoominfo.com/c/bdo-certified-public-accountants-sa/372555588 BDO Greece is a leading Athens-based accounting, tax, and advisory firm that operates as a member of the global BDO network. The company provides comprehensive audit, assurance, and business consulting services to a diverse range of industries, including real estate, hospitality, and the public sector. Employing between 50 and 200 professionals, the firm generates an estimated annual revenue of over $23 million while helping clients navigate complex financial and regulatory landscapes
